title: Image KB Resizer
description: Resize an image to an exact target file size in KB — increase or compress, visual content unchanged
dropHint: Drag an image here, or click to select a file
supportedFormats: Supports JPG / PNG / WEBP / GIF / BMP
approximateNotice: PNG is lossless, so compressing cannot hit the target size exactly — this is the closest size achieved
errorTargetTooSmall: Target size must be greater than 0
